name: Linkslayer @Ignister
name_jp: リンクスレイヤー<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If a Cyberse monster you control would be used as Link Material for an "@Ignister" monster, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field, or you can target 2 if this card on the field was used as material; destroy that card(s). You can only use each effect of "Linkslayer @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Cyberse monster you control would be used as Link Material for an "@Ignister" monster, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field, or you can target 2 if this card on the field was used as material; destroy that card(s). You can only use each effect of "Linkslayer @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If a Cyberse monster you control would be used as Link Material for an "@Ignister" monster, this card in your hand can also be used as material. If this card is sent to the GY as Link Material: You can discard 1 card, then target 1 Spell/Trap on the field, or you can target 2 if this card on the field was used as material; destroy that card(s). You can only use each effect of "Linkslayer @Ignister" once per turn.

action: Uses cards in the hand as Link Materials
Activates if sent to the Graveyard
Activates if used as Link Material
